items.claim: Francis Ngannou is the hardest puncher in the history of fighting.
items.quote: Francis Enanu is the hardest puncher in the history of fighting.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is a unique striker compared to others in the sport.
items.quote: Conor McGregor is just um a oneofone type of striker

items.claim: Alessandro Costa has a low center of gravity and is a physical grappler.
items.quote: Costa's got that low center of gravity. He's a physical grappler

items.claim: Alessandro Costa possesses knockout power and effective striking.
items.quote: but he's a knockout puncher. His striking's good.

items.claim: Cody Duran will be at a striking disadvantage against Alessandro Costa.
items.quote: I think Cody Duran going to be in a bit of a striking deficit
I think Costa's jiu-jitsu is pretty nice.

items.claim: Alessandro Costa will finish Cody Duran via submission.
items.quote: I think we're looking at a submission for Costa.
